titleStmt.title: SII 9.117: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 117. (A.R. No. 37 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE BASTI AT KOGALI, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Śaka 977, Manmatha, Kārtika, śu. 5, Ādityavāra corresponding probably to A.D. 1055 October 27 Friday, not Sunday, as stated. It refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Trailōkyamalladēva and records that a gift of 24 mattars of land was made by the Jaina teacher Indrakīrti-munīndra in Iṭṭage in the division of Kōgaḷi for imparting education in the basadi formerly constructed by Durvinīta (a Gaṅga king).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastasurāsuramastakamaṇimakuṭa jāḷajaḷadhautapadaprastuta
jinēṁdraśāsanamastu ciraṁ bhadramamaḷabhavyajanānāṁ . svasti samastabhu
vanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamalla
dēvara vijayarājyamācandrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire . sakavarṣa 977 ne
ya manmathasaṁvatsarada kārttika suddha paṁcami Ādityavāradaṁdu . vṛtta .
kalikāḷōdrēkadiṁdaṁ manujaraṟivu pōytārppu kuṁdittu śaucaṁ tolagittāyaṁ baḷildattaḷavaḷi
dudenalvēḍa māṇmāṇ nṛḷōkaikalalāmaṁ śiṣṭaciṁtāmaṇi vibudhamanōraṁjanaṁ viśvavidyāla
lanāḷaṁkāraniḻdaṁ prakaṭitayaśanappindrakīrttibratīndraṁ paramajinacaraṇabhaktargguru
bhaktarmmukṣubhaktaramaḷacaritrarddhareyoḷnegaḻdarssuruciratarayaśaramaṇīya
rindrakīrttimunīndrar . Inanuṁ dhātriyamuḷḷinaṁ naḍeya vidyādānakirppattanālkene ma
ttarpparisaṁkheyāgereyanittāhāradānakke sanmuniparggajjiyarggittariṭṭageyadarkkuṁ bāḷa
kōraṁ karaṁ manamoldarttiyinindrakīrttimunipar śiṣṭēṣṭakaḷpāṁghripar . paḍuvaṇa mūḍa
ṇa kallive gaḍiṁbadinārkkaviduve sāyiranārkkaṁ taḍamāgadeḷedukoḷvudu gaḍimella baḍagadese
yagavāntaradoḷ . Idu durvvinītaniṁdaṁ vodaloḷ basadi yida nāḍa mattara ghaḷe yam viditayaśa
rindrakīrttigaḷuditōditamāge māḍidarkkōgaḷiyoḷ . tōmararagaḷa . śrīmadaruhacceraṇa
sarasiruhabhṛṁganaṁ bhomikīrttise negaḷda guṇagaṇōttuṁganaṁ . manucaritaniratanaṁ gurucaraṇabhakta
naṁ . vinamitajagajjanaṁ dharmmānuraktanaṁ . parahitadiḷīpanaṁ nṛgabhūpacaritanaṁ . surucirayaśōdhara
nanakaḷaṁkacaritanaṁ . paṇḍitamukhāṁburuhaśaṇḍamārttaṇḍanaṁ . koṇḍakundānvaya samūhamukhama
ṇḍanaṁ . dēsīyagaṇakumudavanasaraccaṁdranaṁ . traiḷōkyama
llasadasarasikaḷahaṁsanaṁ . bhūlōkatiḷakanaṁ . karmmavidhvaṁsanaṁ . sarvvatōbhadrajanagrihasamuddhara
ṇanaṁ . sarvvaśāstrajñanaṁ . vikaḷajanaśaraṇanaṁ . śiṣṭasurabhūjanaṁ . kavikumudarājanaṁ . Iṣṭasaṁtu
ṣṭanaṁ . kharakiraṇatējanaṁ . daśadharmmakuśaḷanaṁ mērugiridhairyanaṁ . śaśiviśadakīrttiyaṁ dāna
tātparyyanaṁ . vinayaratnākaraṁ kavijanācāryyanaṁ . jinadharmmadīpakananadhikabhujavīryyanaṁ . traiḷō
kyamallēndrakīrttiharimūrttiyaṁ . bhūlōkavikhyātatarayaśōvarttiyaṁ . bhavanabjabhavanabjajaṭherargge
baṇnisalavarggaridu mānavarnneṟedapare baṇnisalu . guru tanage mithyaikavādi gajamṛgarājarari
yarenisidarindraṇandipaṁḍitadēvarene vinayanidhi vipuḷaguṇaniḷayanenisidaṁ . mamamata
me mata menisi bahumatanumenisidaṁ tyāgadoḷ śibiguttaśādṟśyamenisidaṁ . bhōgadoḷ surāThe lettersmata are written below the line.
patige migile tānenisidaṁ . dānadoḷ surakariya dore sari samenisidaṁ . kānīnanaṁ tana
ge hīnane dalenisidaṁ . dharmmānurāgadoḷ dharmmasutanenisidaṁ . nermmaṁbudhaṁgahimakaranaṁ ti
ranisidaṁ gurusēvegiḍadudaṟinamarapatiyenisidaṁ dharaṇīdharatvadiṁ mērunagameni
sidaṁ . vaṁdibṛndārakamayūrāṁbudāgamaṁ . vaṁdijanacūtavanamudavasaṁtāgamaṁ . kaviga
makavādivāgmīndrakaḷpadrumaṁ . kavikadaṁbakakīraphaḷitacūtadrumaṁ kēvaḷame nega
ḷdindrakīrtti nṛpapūjitaṁ . kēvaḷame sakaḷaguṇagaṇayaśōrājitaṁ . maṁgaḷaṁ .
tolagade jainamārggadoḷ niścaḷarappudu dēvaputraraṁ sale negaḷdiḻda kōgaḷiya barddina
vṛttiya mānyakāṟaruṁ tolagisuva dharmmamaṁ maṟedu deyvake kāḷukuṟiyikki
davarppoleyaravargge vṛttiyaṇamāgadu vṛttige mārkke bhavyaraṁ . Aḍagina basanigarggaṁ ka
ḷguḍivavarggaṁ vṛttilōpameṁbī nuḍiyaṁ kaḍagaṇ gaṇisade modaliṁdaṁ kiḍipudadaṁ sthānagu
rugaḷuṁ porbbigaruṁ . mattānuṁ bratameṟesi vṛttigaraṁ kiḍisalāgadeṁbaḍe daṇḍaṁdettippudāṟu
ponna kottaḷiyuṁ sthānagurugaḷuṁ māḍidudaṁ . Intīmāḍida daṇḍaṁ saṁtatiyilladavaro
dakkuṁ ntāgirindrakīrttigaḷintī sāsanamanucitamāgire koṭṭar . Ī dharmmamaṁ rakṣisidāta
kurukṣē kōṭi kavileyaṁ brāhmaṇargge dānaṁgeyda puṇyamidanaḷidātanī tīrtthadoḷā kavilega
Digital edition of SII 9.117 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
